title: Mildly Tangy Irish Bryndza Cheese Ti Leaf Wrap
description: A tangy and nostalgic Irish dish featuring bryndza cheese, kombu-cold-extract, and a dairy-free friendly twist, all wrapped in a ti leaf.
instructions: Start by preparing the ti leaves by washing and drying them thoroughly.
In a small bowl, mix together the bryndza cheese, kombu cold extract, vegan mayo, chopped scallions, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper until well combined.
Lay a ti leaf flat on a surface and place about 1/4 cup of the cheese mixture in the center of the leaf.
Fold the stem end of the ti leaf over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the leaf into a tight cylinder.
Repeat with the remaining ti leaves and cheese mixture.
Serve the ti leaf wraps chilled, garnished with additional chopped scallions if desired.
To add a glassy-jelly texture, refrigerate the wraps for at least 30 minutes before serving.
Just before serving, slice the wraps in half and serve immediately.
